items.markdown:
Salt walls are a popular feature in modern spas, used to create "salt rooms" or "salt caves" for **halotherapy** (dry salt therapy). They are typically constructed from 100% natural **Himalayan pink salt blocks** or tiles, which are often backlit with LEDs to create a signature amber glow and a calming, meditative atmosphere.[[1]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=A%20calm%20environment%20can%20work,immune%20system%20and%20overall%20health.)[[2]](https://saunadekor.com/10-benefits-of-salt-room-therapy-why-its-the-new-wellness-essential/#:~:text=By%20clearing%20the%20airways%20and,performance%20and%20speed%20up%20recovery.)[[3]](https://www.selrox.com/salt-serenity#:~:text=Our%20salt%20walls%20are%20designed,%2C%20sculptures%2C%20and%20decorative%20elements.)[[4]](https://bevaramedspa.com/salt-wall-mind-body-benefits#:~:text=The%20salt%20stones%20can%20increase,while%20alleviating%20some%20skin%20conditions.)[[5]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/halotherapy-salt-therapy/#:~:text=Halotherapy%2C%20also%20known%20as%20dry%20Salt%20Therapy%2C,tract%2C%20even%20the%20smallest%20alveoli%2C%20and%20bronchioles.)

**Key Benefits for Spa Guests** 

- **Respiratory Relief:** Inhaling fine salt particles can help thin mucus, reduce inflammation, and clear airways, making it beneficial for those with asthma, allergies, or bronchitis.
- **Skin Health:** Salt's natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties may help improve conditions like eczema, psoriasis, and acne by balancing skin pH and reducing irritation.
- **Stress Reduction:** The warm, glowing light and negative ions released when salt is heated help lower cortisol levels and boost serotonin, promoting deep relaxation.
- **Atmospheric Purification:** When gently heated, salt acts as a natural ionizer, attracting moisture that evaporates to release negative ions, which helps neutralize dust and allergens in the air.[[1]](https://www.touchamerica.com/products/himalayan-salt-walls?srsltid=AfmBOorlwfYvNDKDjJNrJUtVUeBDndyevomdqDW3uGV-sHWeWYFSImOc#:~:text=Pure%20Himalayan%20salt%20%28derived%20from,Type:%20Fixture)[[2]](https://health.clevelandclinic.org/salt-cave-benefits#:~:text=Allowing%20salt-saturated%20air%20to,different%20way%2C%E2%80%9D%20she%20clarifies.)[[3]](https://islandsaltandspa.com/the-benefits-of-a-salt-room-dry-salt-therapy/#:~:text=Conclusion,health%20and%20well-being%20better.)[[4]](https://bevaramedspa.com/salt-wall-mind-body-benefits#:~:text=The%20salt%20stones%20can%20increase,while%20alleviating%20some%20skin%20conditions.)[[5]](https://saunadekor.com/10-benefits-of-salt-room-therapy-why-its-the-new-wellness-essential/#:~:text=By%20clearing%20the%20airways%20and,performance%20and%20speed%20up%20recovery.)[[6]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=A%20calm%20environment%20can%20work,immune%20system%20and%20overall%20health.)[[7]](https://www.saltedpeace.com/post/10-amazing-benefits-of-using-a-salt-room#:~:text=In%20a%20world%20where%20health,potential%20of%20the%20salt%20room.)

**Types of Salt Wall Systems** 

- **Interlocking Panels:** These pre-fabricated, adhesive-free panels are designed for easier installation and can be removed for maintenance.
- **Custom Brick Walls:** Hand-carved bricks or tiles can be stacked using specialized saltite adhesive or mounted in stainless steel channels to create unique patterns.
- **Active vs. Passive Rooms:** 
	- **Active:** Uses a **halogenerator** to actively disperse pharmaceutical-grade salt into the air for clinical respiratory benefits.
	- **Passive:** Relies on the natural presence of salt walls and lamps for relaxation and light ionization.[[1]](https://islandsaltandspa.com/the-science-behind-halotherapy-how-it-works/#:~:text=Salt%20particles%20interact%20with%20the,or%20side%20effects%20of%20halotherapy?)[[2]](https://www.steamsaunasupply.com/products/scandia-himalayan-salt-wall-panels?srsltid=AfmBOor1MLnYaW6sJDhY4vSIaX7AI0hOH0VEByPf6mxN6bl9T0tEkApI#:~:text=Effortless%20Integration:%20Utilize%20our%20advanced,experience%20that%20transcends%20the%20ordinary.)[[3]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/pages/himalayan-salt-wall-panels?srsltid=AfmBOootJcjQylLtKlHsrJudyURGQDscyxDFxHuK7-6Uj41XyNiGqKCk#:~:text=The%20perfect%20balance%20of%20design,into%20any%20interior%20design%20plan.)[[4]](https://selectsalt.com/halotherapy/how-to-build-a-himalayan-salt-sauna-a-complete-guide/#:~:text=*%20Place%20exhaust%20vent%20high%20on,below%2060%25%20inside%20the%20sauna.)[[5]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/pages/salt-therapy-room?srsltid=AfmBOooWXXn841T7EmUEV9wAxi6Pcrtru6D-3h2SFjcGmQCXw6LMNpcc#:~:text=Step-by-Step%20guide:,bricks%20or%20tiles%20to%20walls.)[[6]](https://islandsaltandspa.com/the-benefits-of-a-salt-room-dry-salt-therapy/#:~:text=Conclusion,health%20and%20well-being%20better.)

**Installation & Maintenance Requirements** 

- **Ideal Environment:** Salt walls must be installed in **low-humidity areas** (ideally 25–35% humidity) to prevent the salt from "sweating" or eroding.
- **Temperature Control:** For optimal salt longevity and guest comfort, rooms are typically kept at a cooler **66–68°F (19–20°C)**.
- **Hardware:** Use **304 or 316 stainless steel** fasteners to prevent corrosion from the salty environment.
- **Cleaning:** Maintenance is generally low, requiring only occasional dry-cleaning with a soft cloth to maintain the wall's shine.[[1]](https://sobaansalts.com/salt-wall-construction/#:~:text=Focus%20on%20spots%20with%20steady,events%20and%20frailty%20%5B8%5D.)[[2]](https://selectsalt.com/salt-cave-business/salt-cave-maintenance/#:~:text=Everything%20you%20wanted%20to%20know,salt%20into%20your%20salt%20room.)[[3]](https://selectsalt.com/halotherapy/how-to-build-a-himalayan-salt-sauna-a-complete-guide/#:~:text=*%20Place%20exhaust%20vent%20high%20on,below%2060%25%20inside%20the%20sauna.)[[4]](https://vocal.media/longevity/how-to-create-a-relaxing-spa-environment-with-himalayan-salt-wall-panels#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20wall%20panels%20are%20long-lasting%20and%20can%20be,to%20the%20interior%20of%20spas.)

**Product Examples & Pricing** 

- **[Himalayan Salt Wall Panels](https://teknastore.com/products/himalayan-salt-wall-panels)** : Interlocking 24x12-inch panels with optional LED lighting, approximately **$2,920** at Tekna Store.
- **Custom Salt Wall Panels** : Made-to-order frames for saunas or wellness centers, starting around **$1,725** from ELEMEANTS on Etsy.
- **[Himalayan Salt Wall Kits](https://www.touchamerica.com/products/himalayan-salt-walls)** : Available in pink or white salt at roughly **$85–$106 per square foot** from TouchAmerica.
- **[Individual Salt Bricks](https://www.amazon.com/Natural-Himalayan-Block-Bricks-Building/dp/B0CCK4Q2PB)** : Bulk packs for DIY projects (e.g., 10-pack of 8"x4"x2" bricks) available from retailers like Amazon.[[1]](https://mysaunaworld.com/products/prosaunas-himalayan-salt-wall#:~:text=Select%20pink%20or%20white%20Himalayan%20salt%20with,grotto%20bathed%20in%20a%20warm%2C%20inviting%20glow.)[[2]](https://selectsalt.com/halotherapy/how-to-build-a-himalayan-salt-sauna-a-complete-guide/#:~:text=*%20Place%20exhaust%20vent%20high%20on,below%2060%25%20inside%20the%20sauna.)[[3]](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Wall%20Panels%20With%20a%20patent-pending,LED%20sheet%20to%20back%20light%20the%20panel)[[4]](https://www.touchamerica.com/products/himalayan-salt-walls)[[5]](https://www.ubuy.mq/en/product/PFPU2E85I-himalayan-salt-bricks-tiles-pack-of-10-ideal-for-salt-spa-sauna-size-8x4x2#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Bricks%20&%20Tiles%20Pack%20of,maintenance%20of%20salt%20bricks%20can%20be%20complex.)

If you’d like, I can find **local contractors** specializing in salt room construction or help you find **halogenerators** to complete your spa setup.[[1]](https://medium.com/@mq7772007/tips-for-building-a-salt-room-fbf0151f7f09#:~:text=Enlist%20a%20contractor%20to%20help%20you.%20You,options%20for%20increasing%20your%20salt%20room's%20effectiveness.)[[2]](https://simourdesign.com/design-tips-medspa-halotherapy-room/#:~:text=Specialists%20Halotherapy%20will%20require%20specialized%20tradesmen%20to,project%20specifically%20to%20create%20these%20Halotherapy%20elements.)[[3]](https://saltroombuilders.com/contact#:~:text=Need%20to%20know%20the%20basics%20of%20salt,for%20your%20project?%20Drop%20us%20a%20line!)
